---
title: "Advanced Social Epidemiology PhD Course Materials"
subtitle: "University of Copenhagen"
author: "Sam Harper"
format: 
  html:
    theme: materia
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here)
```

## 2024 Lectures

0. Counterfactuals and Causal Policy Effects ([slides](slides/00-causal/00-causal.html))
1. Measuring the 'Social' in Social Inequality ([slides](slides/01-social/01-social.html))
2. Measuring the 'Inequality' in Social Inequality ([slides](slides/02-inequality/02-inequality.html))
3. Decomposition Techniques ([slides](slides/03-decomp/03-decomp.html))
4. Quasi-Experimental Designs ([slides](slides/04-quasi/04-quasi.html))

## 2026 Lectures

0. Counterfactuals and Causal Policy Effects ([slides](slides/2026/00-causal.html))

1. Measuring the 'Inequality' in Social Inequality ([slides](slides/2026/02-inequality.html))

2. Decomposition Techniques ([slides](slides/2026/03-decomp.html))

---

Materials and code: <https://github.com/sbh4th/adv-soc-epi>
